description: 5-digit Maryland zip code extracted from the combined city/state/zip field in the source data. Filtered to only zip codes present in the foreclosure dataset.
Calendar year of the violation. Parsed from the violation_date field which uses DD/MM/YYYY format.
Calendar quarter of the violation (1-4). Derived from the violation_date field.

Number of unique violation dates in this zip code during this quarter. Counts unique dates rather than individual violation rows because a single site inspection can generate multiple violation records.
